collections.title: Collections
collections.map_placeholder: No geodata is available for this file.
collections.people_placeholder: The people panel is a placeholder for now. Portraits and captions for recognized people will appear here later.
collections.no_faces: No faces detected in this photo yet.
collections.faces_load_error: Could not load faces for this photo.
collections.no_metadata: No semantic metadata available for this file yet.
collections.delete_confirm: The file will be permanently deleted from disk. This cannot be undone.

people_review.title: Face Review
people_review.subtitle: Cluster-centric review for unresolved face groups across the archive.
people_review.load_error: Could not load the face review queue.
people_review.action_error: Could not save the review action.
people_review.empty_text: There are no unresolved face clusters right now. New ambiguous groups will appear here after the recognizer finds them.
people_review.detail_text: This view groups faces that have not yet collapsed to one confirmed person. You can bind the whole cluster to an existing person, create a new person, or exclude one mistaken face from the current cluster decision.
people_review.assign_existing_text: Use this when the whole cluster clearly belongs to one person already known to the archive.
people_review.create_person_text: If this is a new archive person, create a record and bind the whole cluster to it immediately.
people_review.notes_placeholder: Short note for the person record
people_review.faces_hint: Exclude removes one face from the current cluster/person decision without touching the rest of the group.

wip.title: Section under development
wip.hint: This section is not ready yet. Check back later.

map_view.title: Archive map
map_view.hint: Files with geodata are shown on the shared map. Click a marker to open the file.
map_view.empty: There are no files with geodata in the archive yet.

not_found.title: Page not found
not_found.hint: This address does not exist in the current frontend route structure.

error_view.title: Failed to open the page
error_view.hint: An error occurred while loading this page. Please try again later.
error_view.network_hint: The app could not reach the server. Check the connection and try again.
error_view.timeout_hint: The server did not respond in time. Please try again later.
error_view.server_hint: The server could not process this request. Please try again later.
error_view.http_hint: The server returned an error while loading this page.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Core project paths
settings.inbox_hint: Folder where the organizer picks up new files.
settings.archive_hint: Changing this will require resetting the database.
settings.confirm_archive_message:
All daemons will be restarted with the new paths.
This will also require a database reset in the future.

daemons.not_configured_hint: Set the required paths in {link} to enable this daemon.

import.title: Import
import.subtitle: Select the type of content to import.

scans.label: Scanned photos
scans.desc: Import files processed by scan-batcher. Files must follow the archive naming scheme.

scans.title: Import — Scanned photos
scans.subtitle: Import scanned files from a local folder into the archive.
scans.intro: This import is for files processed by scan-batcher. It places them into the archive according to the naming scheme and fills in the metadata.
scans.req_naming: File name matches the archive naming scheme: year.month.day.hour.minute.second.modifier.group.subgroup.sequence.side.suffix.extension — e.g. 2024.01.15.10.30.00.E.FAM.POR.0001.A.MSR.tif.
scans.req_extensions: Image format: TIFF or JPEG. PNG is technically supported but XMP in PNG is less standardised.
scans.req_ids: XMP DocumentID and InstanceID set by scan-batcher — these identify the file uniquely and link it to its scan session.
scans.writes_title: What will be written during import
scans.write_identifier: dc:identifier / xmp:Identifier — internal archive ID (UUID) for linking previews and derivatives.
scans.write_date: EXIF DateTimeOriginal and XMP-photoshop:DateCreated — date decoded from the file name. For exact dates (modifier E) the full timestamp is written; for approximate dates — a partial value.
scans.write_history: XMP History entry (xmpMM:History) — records that scan import updated the file inside the archive, with timestamp and version.
scans.write_instance: xmpMM:InstanceID — updated to reflect this version of the file after metadata is written.
scans.format_hint: These templates determine how files will be named and organised in the archive. The defaults match the standard scheme — change only if you know what you are doing.
scans.metadata_hint: This step lets you fill additional archive fields for the whole batch. You can also save them as future defaults.
scans.metadata_description_hint: Briefly describe what is shown or what series this image belongs to.
scans.metadata_creator_help: List the original author, scanning author, or archive compilers when relevant.
scans.metadata_rights_hint: Rights statement for scanning, publication, or current use of the file.
scans.metadata_source_hint: Where the original comes from: album, box, folder, family archive, collection, etc.
scans.metadata_credit_hint: Who or which archive should be credited when the image is used.
scans.metadata_terms_hint: Short access or usage terms if they apply to the whole batch.
scans.metadata_marked_hint: Enable only if this batch should explicitly signal rights ownership or restrictions.
scans.collection_none: No collections yet. Create a new one.

organizer.label: File Organizer
organizer.description: Watches inbox for new scans and moves them to the archive.

processor.label: Preview Maker
processor.description: Watches archive for new masters and generates PRV previews.

tiler.label: Tile Cutter
tiler.description: Watches archive for new masters and generates image tile pyramids.

keeper.label: Archive Keeper
keeper.description: Monitors archive integrity: checksums, missing files, lifecycle tracking.

recognizer.label: Face Recognizer
recognizer.description: Scans archive for unprocessed photos and detects faces.

exiftool.missing_hint: ExifTool is required for processing photos. Install it and make sure it is available in PATH.

validation.username_format: Letters, digits and '_' only, min 3 characters

welcome.label: Welcome
welcome.hint:
Welcome to Florentine Abbot — a toolkit for digitizing and organizing photo archives.

This wizard will help you set up the system: check dependencies, create an archive, and configure the incoming folder for new scans.

archive.label: Archive & account
archive.hint: Set the archive folder and create an administrator account.
archive.archive_path_hint: Required. All processed photos will be moved here.
archive.username_hint: Required. Letters, digits and '_' only, min 3 characters.

format.label: Archive format
format.hint: All files in the archive are named according to a unified standard that ensures long-term readability and compatibility with all tools in the system. The defaults match this standard — change them only if you know what you are doing.
format.path_desc: Determines which folder in the archive the file goes into.
format.filename_desc: Determines the file name in the archive. Extension is added automatically.
format.tree_caption: Example of how files will be organized in your archive:
format.legend_sources: Source files — scans, digital photos, RAW data. Read-only, protected from accidental changes.
format.legend_derivatives: Processed derivatives: print-ready files, web exports, etc.
format.legend_prv: Preview images. Stored at the date folder root for quick browsing.
format.dialog_hint_path: Template that determines which folder the file goes into.
format.dialog_hint_filename: Template that determines the file name. Extension is added automatically.

tags.year: Year from the file name. Usually the year of capture or digitisation — depends on how the source file was named.
tags.sequence: Frame sequence number within a series.
tags.modifier: Date certainty: E — exact, A — unknown, B — before, C — circa, F — after.
tags.group: Group — 3-character event or series code (e.g. FAM).
tags.suffix: File version: MSR — master scan, RAW — raw data, PRV — preview, PRT — print.

launch.label: Launch
launch.hint: Review your settings and click Launch.

users.title: Users
users.subtitle: Manage access to the application.
users.confirm_delete_message: Delete user "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.
users.error_username_too_short: Username must be at least 3 characters
users.error_password_too_short: Password must be at least 6 characters

file_manager.title: Files
file_manager.subtitle: Browse the archive and manage files.
file_manager.select_folder: Select a folder from the tree on the left
file_manager.delete_confirm: Delete {n} item(s)? Files will be permanently removed from disk.
file_manager.delete_task_note: This action will be recorded in Tasks.
file_manager.delete_blocked_hint: Only empty folders can be deleted from this screen. Non-empty folders will stay selected.
file_manager.delete_failed_summary: Could not delete {failed} of {total} selected item(s).
file_manager.folder_not_empty: Folder "{names}" is not empty — cannot delete
file_manager.visual_list_hint: A visual list with previews and operational metadata.
file_manager.no_selection_hint: Select a file or folder to see details and available actions.
file_manager.delete_disabled_non_empty_folder: Delete everything inside this folder first. Then you can delete the empty folder itself.
file_manager.delete_disabled_selection_has_non_empty_: Selection contains a non-empty folder. Empty it first before deleting this selection.
